overall.description: A third-person survival horror game scene at night where a character explores the overgrown grounds of an old Victorian house using a flashlight. The character walks along a pond, crosses a wooden bridge, and circles the exterior of the dilapidated building.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown pond edge with tall reeds

agents.ego_description: walking along the pond edge shining flashlight on tall reeds and water

entered.detail: dark still water reflecting minimal light
dry tall grass and reeds growing at water's edge
narrow dirt trail along the bank
lit Victorian-style street lamp in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the edge of a dark pond, flashlight illuminating tall dry reeds and the water's edge. A distant lamp post provides the only other light source in the dense overgrowth.

events.description: steps onto wooden bridge crossing the pond

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge while shining light on the planks ahead

entered.detail: weathered wooden footbridge with railings crossing the water

segments.scene_description: The character crosses a narrow wooden footbridge over the dark water, leaving the reeds behind. The Victorian house becomes visible in the distance as the bridge ends.

events.description: exits bridge and approaches the house from the side

agents.ego_description: walking up the garden path toward the house, sweeping light across the lawn

entered.detail: large two-story wooden house with lit windows and overgrown yard
weathered wooden garden bench beside the path
dense shrubs and vegetation lining the path

segments.scene_description: Moving from the bridge onto a dirt garden path, the character approaches the side of the old Victorian house. The path is lined with overgrown bushes and a wooden bench sits off to the right.

events.description: begins circling around the house, turning left to follow the perimeter

agents.ego_description: circling the house exterior, examining different sides with the flashlight

entered.detail: covered side porch with columns and overgrown vines

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the house, moving from the side toward the front. The flashlight reveals overgrown vines covering the wooden siding and a covered side porch.

events.description: approaches the front porch and steps of the house

agents.ego_description: approaching the front entrance, shining light on the porch and front door

entered.detail: covered front porch with wooden railings and support beams
wooden staircase leading up to the front door
double front doors with glass panels
thick ivy vines climbing the front facade

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the front of the house, approaching the covered porch and wooden steps. The flashlight illuminates the front door and thick ivy covering the facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: side garden with white gazebo and iron fence

events.description: moves away from front entrance toward side garden area

agents.ego_description: walking toward the side garden, passing the gazebo and iron fence

entered.detail: white wooden gazebo with open sides in the garden
wrought iron fence with decorative arches
tall dark trees surrounding the property

segments.scene_description: Moving away from the front entrance, the character explores the side garden where a white wooden gazebo and decorative iron fence stand. The house recedes to the left as the character approaches the garden gate.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the edge of a dark, overgrown pond toward the imposing facade and gardens of a dilapidated Victorian house. It begins with the character walking through tall dry reeds by the water's edge, guided by a flashlight and a distant lamp post, before crossing a narrow wooden footbridge. As the bridge ends, the scene shifts onto a dirt garden path lined with overgrown bushes and a wooden bench, leading the camera closer to the side of the house. The movement then circles the building, revealing vines clinging to the wooden siding and a covered side porch before finally reaching the front entrance and its ivy-covered facade. The shot concludes by moving away from the front door toward a side garden, where the house recedes to the left as the camera approaches a white wooden gazebo and a decorative iron fence.
